ab: lalima ko paro no loma’ niyam.
en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: malacafay kako to wama, wina, kaka to fa’inayan ato kaka to fafahiyan a ma’orip.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: akawangay ko wama ako, o malatayxinay ko wama ako.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: mangiliway ko wina ako, o malaisingay ko wina ako.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: sano’Amisan no wama kami a caciyaw i loma’.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the ’Amis language with us at home.

ab: pa’aliwacan to kaciherangan i, minokay kami a talaniyaro’.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: malacafay kako to kaka to fa’inayan fafahiyan a mitakora’.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: maolah kako to paro no loma’ niyam.
en: I like our family very much.
